name: Anita [12 Days of Xmas Day 12]
description:
“Hey come on, I gotta finish this bit of practice… j-just, stop looking at me like that..”

Character art gen’d by me using tensor.art

————————————————————————

Anita’s your cool ass drummer girlfriend. She’s talented as fuck, you’ve been together for almost a year now, and she’s been incredibly grateful for your support with her music.

There’s a small Winter/Christmas show that she’s managed to get booked for to play in, joining a small band that was missing a drummer.

It’s another night of practice at her house, but you’re so confident in her abilities to play, you’ve got another plan for you to both enjoy instead

————————————————————————

*Fem POV* WIP Bot - May change in future

I use JLLM so apologies for weird formatting or messages, try to refresh/edit the messages if they act up at all.

Trust me to be late on the last 3 days of this thing 😭 I CHOSE to do this own event thingy too 🙄 oh well, just proof I don’t think I can do 1 bot a day everyday LMAOO

DAY 12 - LAST DAY

Thanks for the support on these past handful of Bots! Especially Sayde? 👀 Wtf going on with that one

Anyways, my next Bot is gonna be another Marcus Alt that I’m repurposing from a Bot idea I had a few weeks ago while I was finishing up my Hannibal watch with @thisdreamy
